official_sources.surface: MEXC Spot and Contract API surfaces
official_sources.evidence: The current adapter wires Spot and USDT contract/perpetual metadata, depth, balances, positions, fees and order lifecycle.
Delivery-state contract semantics are tracked as a separate product boundary because the current parser and runtime normalize contract instruments as perpetual.

runtime_isolation: Do not promote delivery-state contracts through the current perpetual routing until metadata filters, settlement state, account/position parsers and signed order lifecycle reconciliation are product-specific.
unsafe_to_promote_without: delivery market-type routing separated from perpetual
delivery order book and public stream fixtures
delivery account and position parser coverage
signed delivery order lifecycle request specs
remaining_work: split delivery-state contracts from perpetual symbols in metadata
add delivery account/position/order lifecycle request specs
add delivery-specific parser fixtures and guarded runtime tests
